item.description: President Donald Trump used his prime-time speech Thursday to raise questions about election integrity in the build-up to November’s key midterms while reviving false claims about the 2020 election and asserting that China targeted his campaign. NBC’s Gabe Gutierrez reports for TODAY.

media:content.media:title: Trump Uses Prime-Time Speech to Revive False Election Claims
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump used his prime-time speech Thursday to raise questions about election integrity in the build-up to November’s key midterms while reviving false claims about the 2020 election and asserting that China targeted his campaign. NBC’s Gabe Gutierrez reports for TODAY.

item.title: Trump Uses Prime-Time Speech to Revive False Election Claims

item.description: President Trump accused China of having a role in influencing the 2020 election during his speech about election interference. NBC News' Garrett Haake has more on how this could impact China's relationship with the U.S.

media:content.media:title: How Trump's election allegations against China could impact relations with U.S.
media:content.media:description: President Trump accused China of having a role in influencing the 2020 election during his speech about election interference. NBC News' Garrett Haake has more on how this could impact China's relationship with the U.S.

item.title: How Trump's election allegations against China could impact relations with U.S.

item.description: Bridges were severely damaged in Iran after the U.S. military said it completed its sixth consecutive night of strikes against the country. CENTCOM said in a statement posted on X that it targeted “coastal surveillance and air defense sites, military logistics infrastructure, and maritime capabilities.”

media:content.media:title: Iranian bridges severely damaged after sixth night of U.S. strikes
media:content.media:description: Bridges were severely damaged in Iran after the U.S. military said it completed its sixth consecutive night of strikes against the country. CENTCOM said in a statement posted on X that it targeted “coastal surveillance and air defense sites, military logistics infrastructure, and maritime capabilities.”

item.title: Iranian bridges severely damaged after sixth night of U.S. strikes

item.description: Maine Democratic Senate candidates Nirav Shah, Shenna Bellows, Jordan Wood and Troy Jackson discuss which ideas from Graham Platner's platform they would use if they are chosen as the nominee.

media:content.media:title: Maine Democratic Senate candidates discuss which of Platner's ideas they would use
media:content.media:description: Maine Democratic Senate candidates Nirav Shah, Shenna Bellows, Jordan Wood and Troy Jackson discuss which ideas from Graham Platner's platform they would use if they are chosen as the nominee.

item.title: Maine Democratic Senate candidates discuss which of Platner's ideas they would use

item.description: The Food and Drug Administration is investigating a potential connection to iceberg lettuce supplied to Taco Bell by produce giant Taylor Farms as the possible source of the cyclosporiasis outbreak that has sickened thousands across 34 states. The fast-food giant is announcing a voluntary recall of some potentially impacted lettuce from its restaurants. NBC’s Anne Thompson reports for TODAY.

media:content.media:title: Taylor Farms Lettuce at Taco Bell Linked to Stomach Bug Outbreak
media:content.media:description: The Food and Drug Administration is investigating a potential connection to iceberg lettuce supplied to Taco Bell by produce giant Taylor Farms as the possible source of the cyclosporiasis outbreak that has sickened thousands across 34 states. The fast-food giant is announcing a voluntary recall of some potentially impacted lettuce from its restaurants. NBC’s Anne Thompson reports for TODAY.

item.title: Taylor Farms Lettuce at Taco Bell Linked to Stomach Bug Outbreak

item.dc:creator: Nicole Acevedo
item.description: Karolina Rojas wanted to make sure that her husband, Johan Sebastián Durán Guerrero, was remembered the right way after he was fatally shot by an ICE officer in Biddeford, Maine.

media:content.media:text: The family of Johan Sebastián Durán Guerrero speaks in a press conference on July 16, 2026.
media:content.media:description: The family of Johan Sebastián Durán Guerrero speaks at a press conference on Thursday.

media:content.media:text: A makeshift memorial for Johan Sebastián Durán Guerrero with flowers, flags, signs and photos.
media:content.media:description: The family of Johan Sebastián Durán Guerrero speaks at a press conference on Thursday.

item.title: Wife of Colombian father killed by ICE in Maine says they had planned to grow old together

item.dc:creator: Yuliya Talmazan
item.description: A former loyalist blogger turned fierce critic of Russian President Vladimir Putin has been detained and accused of spreading false information about the armed forces, state media reported Friday.

media:content.media:text: Ilya Remeslo.
media:content.media:description: Ilya Remeslo.

media:content.media:text: Russia Anti-War Candidate Banned
media:content.media:description: Ilya Remeslo.

item.title: Pro-Kremlin blogger who turned on Putin is arrested as Russia steps up crackdown

item.dc:creator: Mithil Aggarwal
item.description: The United States attacked bridges and other key infrastructure in southern Iran overnight into Friday, capping nearly a week of strikes aimed at intensifying pressure on Tehran to give up control of the Strait of Hormuz.

media:content.media:text: US strikes on Iran
media:content.media:description: Footage released by Centcom on July 17, 2026 shows what it says are recent strikes on military targets in Iran.

media:content.media:text: The aftermath of a U.S. strike on a target inside Iran, in footage released by U.S. Central Command on Friday.
media:content.media:description: The aftermath of a U.S. strike on a target inside Iran, in footage released by U.S. Central Command on Friday.

media:content.media:text: Anti-US posters were hung in the squares of Tehran
media:content.media:description: An anti-U.S. banner featuring images of President Donald Trump, his staff and family members over coffins draped in the American flag beneath the Persian inscription 'Blood for blood' in Tehran on Thursday.

item.title: U.S. strikes bridges around key port in Iran, expanding campaign in battle over Hormuz

item.dc:creator: Sophie Ziedalski
Maggie McCabe
item.description: A historic hub for free speech and protest is under the spotlight as the Trump administration proposes adding permanent fencing around Lafayette Square.

media:content.media:text: Trump Military Parade
media:content.media:description: The proposal is the latest in a series efforts by the Trump administration to reshape prominent landmarks in Washington.

item.title: Federal panel signals it could support permanent fencing around White House park known for protests

item.dc:creator: Harry Rabinowitz
Zoe Malin
Cory Fernandez
Mili Godio
Ashley Morris
item.description: We rounded up July’s newest tech, home and beauty products. Shop the Hoka Clifton 11, Beis Weekender, Olaplex serum oil mist and more.

media:content.media:text: This month, brands like Olaplex, Beis and Hoka introduced new products across beauty, travel, footwear and more.
media:content.media:description: This month, brands like Olaplex, Beis and Hoka introduced new products across beauty, travel, footwear and more.

media:content.media:text: This month, brands like Olaplex, Beis and Hoka introduced new products across beauty, travel, footwear and more.
media:content.media:description: This month, brands like Olaplex, Beis and Hoka introduced new products across beauty, travel, footwear and more.

item.title: 53+ best new products in July from Hoka, Beis, Olaplex and more

item.dc:creator: Zoe Malin
item.description: Béis used customer feedback to redesign its core collection of travel essentials, including The Weekender. Founder Shay Mitchell shares what’s new and what she packs inside.

media:content.media:text: Béis founder Shay Mitchell’s favorite travel essentials to keep in her new-and-improved Weekender include Rini Daily Barrier Cream, the Shark ChillPill fan and HydraLyte Electrolyte Powder.
media:content.media:description: Béis founder Shay Mitchell’s favorite travel essentials to keep in her new-and-improved Weekender include Rini Daily Barrier Cream, the Shark ChillPill fan and HydraLyte Electrolyte Powder.

media:content.media:text: Béis founder Shay Mitchell’s favorite travel essentials to keep in her new-and-improved Weekender include Rini Daily Barrier Cream, the Shark ChillPill fan and HydraLyte Electrolyte Powder.
media:content.media:description: Béis founder Shay Mitchell’s favorite travel essentials to keep in her new-and-improved Weekender include Rini Daily Barrier Cream, the Shark ChillPill fan and HydraLyte Electrolyte Powder.

item.title: Talking Shop with Béis founder Shay Mitchell

item.dc:creator: Ashley Morris
item.description: Medicube’s Booster Pro X2 is 26% off. The new device is an upgrade to the Booster Pro and has seven modes that work for all skin types.

media:content.media:text: The device has a range of modes and intensities to address common skin care concerns.
media:content.media:description: The device has a range of modes and intensities to address common skin care concerns.

media:content.media:text: The device has a range of modes and intensities to address common skin care concerns.
media:content.media:description: The device has a range of modes and intensities to address common skin care concerns.

item.title: Deal of the Day: Medicube’s new skin care device is already over 25% off on Amazon

item.dc:creator: Deanna Pai
item.description: The best pregnancy-safe shampoos won’t exacerbate scalp dryness or dandruff. Shop the best ones from Necessaire, Vanicream and more.

media:content.media:text: For treating dandruff, stick with formulas with zinc pyrithione and selenium sulfide, and steer clear of potential irritants like sulfates and synthetic fragrances.
media:content.media:description: For treating dandruff, stick with formulas with zinc pyrithione and selenium sulfide, and steer clear of potential irritants like sulfates and synthetic fragrances.

media:content.media:text: For treating dandruff, stick with formulas with zinc pyrithione and selenium sulfide, and steer clear of potential irritants like sulfates and synthetic fragrances.
media:content.media:description: For treating dandruff, stick with formulas with zinc pyrithione and selenium sulfide, and steer clear of potential irritants like sulfates and synthetic fragrances.

item.title: These shampoos are 100% pregnancy-safe, according to experts

item.description: Smoke from Canadian wildfires is blanketing major cities across the U.S., obscuring iconic skylines and prompting air quality alerts. NBC News’ Maggie Vespa reports.

media:content.media:title: Midwest sees world's worst air quality as wildfire smoke spreads
media:content.media:description: Smoke from Canadian wildfires is blanketing major cities across the U.S., obscuring iconic skylines and prompting air quality alerts. NBC News’ Maggie Vespa reports.

item.title: Midwest sees world's worst air quality as wildfire smoke spreads

item.dc:creator: Rebecca Cohen
Austin Mullen
item.description: Weeks after a 76-year-old woman was killed when a Tesla, operating on Full Self-Driving, crashed into her Texas home, the National Transportation Safety Board concluded that the car’s driver overrode the driver assistance mode and accelerated into the building.

media:content.media:text: Tesla crash.
media:content.media:description: The aftermath of the crash into Martha Avila's home last month.

media:content.media:text: Tesla crash gif.
media:content.media:description: The aftermath of the crash into Martha Avila's home last month.

item.title: Tesla driver whose car slammed into home overrode driver assistance mode, NTSB says

item.dc:creator: Doha Madani
item.description: A missing California millionaire’s remains have been identified 45 years after the 80-year-old woman disappeared without a trace.

media:content.media:text: USA - Crime - California Prisons
media:content.media:description: A guard walks outside the California Institution for Men in Chino, Calif., in 2011.

item.title: Missing California millionaire’s remains identified 45 years after her disappearance

item.dc:creator: Sophie Ziedalski
Maggie McCabe
item.description: A historic hub for free speech and protest is under the spotlight as the Trump administration proposes adding permanent fencing around Lafayette Square.

media:content.media:text: Trump Military Parade
media:content.media:description: The proposal is the latest in a series efforts by the Trump administration to reshape prominent landmarks in Washington.

item.title: Federal panel signals it could support permanent fencing around White House park known for protests

item.description: Epstein survivor Dani Bensky describes the "emotional" meeting she and fellow survivors had with Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche. Bensky calls for continued commitment from Blanche in the Epstein investigation, describing the meeting as "frustrating."

media:content.media:title: Epstein survivor describes 'emotional' Todd Blanche meeting
media:content.media:description: Epstein survivor Dani Bensky describes the "emotional" meeting she and fellow survivors had with Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche. Bensky calls for continued commitment from Blanche in the Epstein investigation, describing the meeting as "frustrating."

item.title: Epstein survivor describes 'emotional' Todd Blanche meeting

item.dc:creator: Brennan Leach
Sahil Kapur
item.description: Sen. John Fetterman said he would leave the Democratic Party if it “officially” becomes “the anti-Israel party.”

media:content.media:text: John Fetterman
media:content.media:description: Sen. John Fetterman, D-Pa., speaks on Capitol Hill on March 18, 2026.

item.title: Sen. John Fetterman says he’ll leave the Democratic Party if it ‘officially’ becomes ‘anti-Israel’
